summary: Full E2E test of Moon Beauty Space marketing site. Backend (FastAPI + MongoDB) and frontend (React) both verified end-to-end. All 7 backend pytest cases pass and every requested frontend flow works on desktop and mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it is referenced in create_booking. Currently safe because it's only used inside the function body at request time, but logger is configured at import-time AFTER the route registration; reorganize so logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) sit near the top of the file (right after imports) to avoid relying on module-load ordering and to ensure errors during early startup are captured.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in modern FastAPI; switch to lifespan handlers.
POST /api/bookings returns 200 instead of 201 Created — minor REST convention nit (request statement only required 200, so not a bug).
No rate limiting / spam protection on POST /api/bookings — a public unauthenticated endpoint that writes to MongoDB is an abuse vector; recommend adding basic rate limiting / honeypot.
Booking form does not validate phone format on the client; backend only enforces 4-40 chars. Consider a stricter regex.
booksyUrl in /app/frontend/src/constants/site.js is the generic 'https://booksy.com/' homepage rather than the salon's specific Booksy page — confirm with stakeholder before launch.
Translations file is 369 lines and fine, but if more languages are added it should be split per-locale file.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created a handful of TEST_-prefixed bookings in MongoDB via the public POST /api/bookings endpoint during testing (TEST_Anna Kowalska, TEST_Order1, TEST_Order2, TEST_X attempts, TEST_Playwright). They live in the 'bookings' collection and can be removed safely if a clean DB is needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend exposes only /api/, /api/status (GET/POST), /api/bookings (GET/POST). Bookings model: name/phone/service required; preferred_date/message/language optional; server adds id (uuid), created_at (iso string in DB, datetime in response), status='new'. MongoDB _id is already excluded in list queries. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix; language is held in LanguageContext (PL default); theme toggle adds/removes 'dark' class on <html>. Booking form submits via axios POST and shows booking-success block (replaces the form) on 2xx response. Booksy link uses generic booksy.com — flagged for stakeholder review.
